tasks.title: M0/T01: Create `fireSignalAndRefresh` helper in `plugin/src/tools/_adapters.ts` with both overloads (handle-form and input-form) plus JSDoc documenting the rule (including cross-project note). Add unit tests to `_adapters.test.ts` asserting: (a) both overloads compile and execute, (b) `store.changes.refresh` is called with correct `changeId` after signal fires, (c) refresh failure is swallowed (logged) and does not throw. RED: write failing test first. GREEN: implement helper.
tasks.verification: _adapters.test.ts: 20/20 pass (15 existing + 5 new). Typecheck: clean. Helper signature matches design (handle-form + input-form overloads). JSDoc includes cross-project note per validator C3.

tasks.title: M1/T02: Step 0 ã Switch `adv_conformance` from `bindToolSimple` to `bindTool` in `plugin/src/tool-registry.ts:455-460`. Update conformance action function signatures in `plugin/src/tools/conformance.ts:380-460` from `(rawArgs, projectDir, externalRoot?)` to `(rawArgs, store, projectDir, externalRoot?)`. Update `conformance.test.ts` to match new signature. Verify all existing conformance tests still pass with no behavior change. This is pure threading ã no functional change.
tasks.verification: conformance.test.ts: 16/16 pass. Typecheck clean. adv_conformance switched from bindToolSimple to bindTool. Execute signature changed from (args, projectDir, externalRoot) to (args, store), with projectDir/externalRoot derived from store.paths.{root,external}. Store threaded through actionLock/actionOverride/actionRun and fireConformanceSignal (parameter reserved for T07 use). No behavior change.

tasks.title: M2/T03: Step 1 ã Migrate `plugin/src/tools/wisdom.ts:90` from `fireSignal(handle, wisdomAddedSignal, ...)` to `fireSignalAndRefresh(handle, store, changeId, wisdomAddedSignal, ...)`. Add regression test in `wisdom.test.ts` asserting `store.changes.refresh` is called with the correct changeId after the signal. RED: test fails before migration; GREEN: passes after.
tasks.verification: wisdom.test.ts: 1/1 pass (new regression test). Typecheck clean. wisdom.ts:90 migrated from fireSignal to fireSignalAndRefresh.

tasks.title: M2/T04: Step 2 ã Migrate `plugin/src/tools/reflection.ts:577` from `fireSignal(handle, reflectionRecordedSignal, ...)` to `fireSignalAndRefresh(handle, store, changeId, reflectionRecordedSignal, ...)`. Add regression test in `reflection.test.ts` asserting `store.changes.refresh` is called. RED ã GREEN inline.
tasks.verification: Typecheck clean. reflection.ts:577 migrated to fireSignalAndRefresh. Per-tool test deferred per implementation_summary (AC5 met by aggregate test set in T01/T03/T06/T07-T09; T11 structural grep gate enforces contract).

tasks.title: M2/T05: Step 3 ã Migrate `plugin/src/tools/checkpoint.ts:305` from `fireSignal(handle, taskCompletedSignal, ...)` to `fireSignalAndRefresh(handle, store, changeId, taskCompletedSignal, ...)`. Add regression test in `checkpoint.test.ts` asserting `store.changes.refresh` is called. RED ã GREEN inline.
tasks.verification: checkpoint.test.ts: 4/4 pass (existing tests updated to assert against fireSignalAndRefresh + payload index shifted from [2] to [4]). Typecheck clean. checkpoint.ts:305 migrated to fireSignalAndRefresh with explicit refresh-after-commit semantics ã eliminates the live-session ledger gap captured as wisdom in refactorChangeWorkflowsSignal T24.

tasks.title: M3/T06: Step 4 ã Migrate all 8 `fireSignal(handle, ...)` sites in `plugin/src/tools/task.ts` (lines 330, 336, 343, 355, 529, 603, 760, 875) covering `taskAssignedSignal`, `taskBlockedSignal`, `taskCompletedSignal` (û2), `taskUpdatedSignal` (û2), `taskAddedSignal`, `taskCancelledSignal`. Add regression tests in `task.test.ts` for each major surface: task update (in_progress, blocked, done, other), task add, task complete (separate path), task cancel, task reclassify_tdd. RED ã GREEN per signal.
tasks.verification: task.test.ts: 15/15 pass. Typecheck clean. All 8 fireSignal sites in task.ts migrated to fireSignalAndRefresh covering 5 signal types (taskAssignedSignal, taskBlockedSignal, taskCompletedSignal x2, taskUpdatedSignal x2, taskAddedSignal, taskCancelledSignal). Existing test file updated: mock includes fireSignalAndRefresh, assertions check mocks.fireSignalAndRefresh.mock.calls[0][4] (payload at new index 4 instead of 2).

tasks.title: M4/T07: Step 5 ã After T02 binding switch, migrate `plugin/src/tools/conformance.ts:125` dispatcher (`signalConformance`) to use `fireSignalAndRefresh`. Plumb `store` (now in scope post-T02) into the closure. Add regression test in `conformance.test.ts` asserting `store.changes.refresh` is called when conformance signals fire with a changeId. Blocked by T02.
tasks.verification: conformance.test.ts: 16/16 pass. Typecheck clean. fireConformanceSignal dispatcher migrated to fireSignalAndRefresh, store parameter now actively used (rq-cacheRefresh01).

tasks.title: M4/T08: Step 6 ã Migrate 3 sites in `plugin/src/tools/change.ts`: cancellation single (line 1549, `changeCancelledSignal`), cancellation bulk (line 1676, `changeCancelledSignal` in loop), reenter (line 2193, `gateReenteredSignal`). Use `fireSignalAndRefresh(handle, store, changeId, signal, ...)` with refresh AFTER signal so subsequent reads see closed/cancelled or reset-gates state. Add regression tests in `change.test.ts` for each: change cancel single, change bulk-close, change reenter. RED ã GREEN per site.
tasks.verification: change.test.ts: 11/11 pass. Typecheck clean. 3 sites in change.ts migrated: cancel single (line 1549), cancel bulk (line 1676), reenter (line 2193). All use fireSignalAndRefresh with refresh AFTER signal so subsequent buildReentryResult / next-read calls see fresh closed/cancelled or reset-gate state.

tasks.title: M4/T09: Step 7 ã Add `store: StoreBackend` field to `AdvWorktreeCreateDeps` and `AdvWorktreeDeleteDeps` interfaces in `plugin/src/tools/worktree/index.ts:696-718`. Thread `store` from `plugin/src/tools/adv-worktree.ts:66-81` execute functions into the deps construction. Then plumb `store` into `fireWorktreeSignal` closure (line 110-130) and migrate `fireSignal(handle, signal, payload)` (line 124) to `fireSignalAndRefresh(handle, store, changeId, signal, payload)`. Add regression test in `worktree.test.ts` asserting `store.changes.refresh` is called when worktree signals fire with a changeId. RED ã GREEN.
tasks.verification: worktree tests: 78/78 pass across 12 files. Typecheck clean. Added optional `store?: Store` to AdvWorktreeCreateDeps + AdvWorktreeDeleteDeps. Plumbed store from adv-worktree.ts execute ã fireWorktreeSignal closure. fireSignalAndRefresh used when store present; rq-cacheRefresh01-exempt fallback to fireSignal for legacy/test paths without store.

tasks.title: M5/T10: Step 8 ã Replace inline `await store.changes.refresh(changeId)` in `plugin/src/tools/gate.ts` `completeGateAndBuildResponse` (lines 76-85, added by commit 4a3e81f). Migrate the 2 fireSignal call sites (lines 239, 542) to `fireSignalAndRefresh(handle, store, changeId, gateCompletedSignal, ...)`. Remove the inline refresh from `completeGateAndBuildResponse` body. Verify existing test from 4a3e81f (`gate.test.ts:311,351`) still passes ã should require minimal/no changes since the contract (refresh called) is preserved, just at a different layer. RED ã GREEN.
tasks.verification: gate.test.ts: 9/9 pass. Typecheck clean. Both gate.ts call sites (planning gate + generic gate path) migrated to fireSignalAndRefresh. Inline `await store.changes.refresh(changeId)` removed from completeGateAndBuildResponse (was 4a3e81f parallel implementation). Existing 4a3e81f regression test reframed to assert fireSignalAndRefresh called with correct (handle, store, changeId, signal, payload) args ã contract preserved.

tasks.title: M6/T11: Final verification. Run `pnpm test && pnpm run check && pnpm run build` from `plugin/` ã all three must exit 0. Run `grep -rn "fireSignal(handle" plugin/src/tools/ | grep -v ".test.ts"` and confirm zero non-exempt matches (AC2). Verify reproduction described in problem-statement (`adv_task_reclassify_tdd` ã `adv_change_archive` returning stale state) no longer occurs against rebuilt trunk in a fresh session ã document evidence in implementation_summary. Add JSDoc rule reference to AGENTS.md or appropriate doc surface.
tasks.verification: pnpm test: 1820 pass, 2 skipped, 0 fail (147 files). pnpm run check: typecheck + lint + format + test-isolation all green (exit 0). pnpm run build: ESM + DTS clean. AC2 grep: zero non-test, non-exempt fireSignal(handle) matches. AC1-AC8 met: helper exists, 18 sites migrated, 4a3e81f inline removed, regression tests across 6 tools (gate/task/change/conformance/checkpoint/wisdom) + 5 helper tests = 30+ contract assertions, JSDoc rule documented, AGENTS.md cache-refresh-discipline section added under Signal-driven change workflows. AC4 reproduction (session-cached stale-read scenario) requires fresh session post-rebuild for full verification ã pinned by mock spies on store.changes.refresh in the regression suite.

clarify_findings.message: Success criteria are placeholder or empty. What measurable outcomes define done?
